content.title: Thorax Radiology
content.excerpt: Continuous CT series of the thorax.
content.content:
## Introduction: Contiguous CT of the Thorax, Abdomen, and Pelvis

A normal CT of the chest, abdomen and pelvis, consisting of 130 3mm thick axial sections, has been labelled for your review and self learning. It begins on the next page, with the first image of the chest, and continues through the pelvis.

The coronal image on the right serves as a frame of reference for the levels of the axial sections on the subsequent series.
